content.en:
"It seems that the Blood Ancestor has already refined the Blood Geng Source Crystal, and his cultivation should have almost reached the limit of the third stage, condensing 129,600 drops of immeasurable blood!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

With such a powerful cultivation, the Star Sea Great Ancestor probably didn't have the confidence to kill it, after all, the Blood Great Ancestor itself was very powerful, and it was already difficult to kill the opponent at the same level.

Although the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea is very demonic and ranks sixth on the Infinite Blood List, the Bloody Great Ancestor at this moment may also have the qualifications to enter the Infinite Blood List.

Therefore, it was unlikely that the Star Sea Ancestor would be able to kill the Blood Ancestor.

Of course, Ye Tian doesn't pay attention to this.

After all, he has nothing to do with the Raccoon Blood Ancestor now, so he naturally doesn't care about his life or death.

After coming to the fifth layer, Ye Tian also received some messages and knew about the situation on the fifth layer.

"The fifth layer was originally to create an immeasurable body secret technique!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In order to obtain benefits from the fifth layer of the Ruins Stone Tower, one must create an immeasurable body secret technique in order to obtain benefits.

And the immeasurable body secret technique created must be created according to the immeasurable body secret technique of the ruins stone tower, if you fool the immeasurable body secret technique from the outside world, it will definitely not work.

After all, each Infinite Diagram is unique, and if you comprehend the Infinite Body Secret Technique from the Infinite Diagram of the Ruins Stone Tower, it is naturally very easy.

For the third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, there is a mutilated immeasurable diagram, and it is also possible to create an immeasurable body secret technique.

It may be difficult to create the Medium and Infinite Body Secret Techniques and the Superior Infinite Body Secret Arts, but it should not be difficult to create the Inferior Infinite Body Secret Techniques.

However, it must be created within the specified time, that is, the first year of the 10 million realms.

If this time period can't be created, it will still be kicked out.

But they had already left the fourth layer of the ruins stone tower, and without the existence of the Incomplete Infinite Diagram, and without the existence of the imprint, they could not remember the many mysteries of the Incomplete Infinite Diagram, at most they could remember the little part of their own perfection and the vague memory of the Incomplete Infinite Diagram.

This makes it very difficult for them, and the longer it goes, the more blurred their memories become, which is unavoidable.

If they had thoroughly perfected the Nine Incomplete Infinite Diagrams and combined the Nine Incomplete Infinite Diagrams, it would be difficult for them to forget, even if it was the Ruined Stone Tower.

Unfortunately, they can't.

When Ye Tian came to the fifth layer, the Star Sea Great Ancestor had been here for a long time, but they still hadn't created a secret technique of the inferior immeasurable body.

After all, it would take a long time to create such a secret technique, and if there was a complete inheritance, they could easily create it.

Now.

Ye Tian was thinking about what immeasurable body secret technique he should create.

"The Mahayana Immeasurable Body Secret Technique takes a long time, and the first year of the 10 million realms seems to be a long time, but it should still not be created. If I can't create it, then it's equal to zero, and the ruins stone tower can't detect my results, so it will kick me out. Let's create a superior immeasurable body secret art first!"

Ye Tian decided.

The difficulty of creating a superior immeasurable body secret technique has been reduced a lot, and it can definitely be easily created within the first year of the 10 million realms, and it will not even take so much time.

In this way, a group of high-level immeasurable lifeforms created the immeasurable body secret technique on the fifth layer of the ruins stone tower.

The first year of the 100,000 realms!

The first year of the million-world world!

As time approached the first year of the 10 million realms, some high-level immeasurable lifeforms were in a hurry, making it more and more difficult to create immeasurable body secret techniques.

In the first year of the more than seven million realms when the Raccoon Blood Ancestor entered, the Raccoon Blood Ancestor finally succeeded in creating a secret technique of inferiority and immeasurable body.

This Inferior Immeasurable Body Secret Technique belongs to him, and he can sell it to any Great Ancestor to practice in the future, and if it is converted into value, it is not low.

"Good luck guy!"

Xinghai Great Ancestor frowned.

He didn't want the Raccoon Blood Ancestor to create an immeasurable body secret technique and successfully enter the sixth layer, after all, in that case, the Raccoon Blood Ancestor would be able to obtain the treasure that would help him impact the fourth stage!

Once the Raccoon Blood Ancestor hits the fourth stage, even he is no opponent, where would he dare to trouble the Raccoon Blood Ancestor at that time!

Airplanes!

A black stone appeared in the hands of the Blood Ancestor, which was the benefit given to him by the Ruined Stone Tower.

"This is the Black God Armor Stone!"

Xinghai Ancestor was taken aback.

The Black Divine Armor Stone is not a thing of the Xuanqi Realm, but another heaven and earth that intersects with the Nine Shadows Blood Abyss—the Divine Armor Realm!

The strength of the Shenjia Realm is naturally inferior to the Xuanqi Realm, but it is still very strong, but because the Divine Armor Realm is not as good as the Xuanqi Realm, the Ruins Stone Tower fell in the Xuanqi Realm.

Of course, this is the Raccoon Blood Ancestor using special means to forcibly let the Xuanqi Territory Nine Shadows Blood Abyss.

When the later stage of the ruin stone tower is stable, it will be connected to the Shenjia realm again, and at that time, the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the Shenjia realm will also be eligible to enter the ruin stone tower.

And the Black God Armor Stone is a treasure in the Divine Armor Realm, but there is also a Golden God Armor Stone on it, but the value of the Golden God Armor Stone is enough to make the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the fourth stage desperate.

The function of the Black God Armor Stone is to form a defensive armor to protect the whole body after refining, and it has extremely terrifying defensive power.

There was once a top-level third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform wearing a defensive armor formed by the Black God Armor Stone, and he resisted the attack of the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, only suffered minor injuries, and finally fled.

"Hahaha, Black God Armor, that's great!!"

The Blood Ancestor was extremely excited.

He had only heard of this treasure, but he had never seen it.

Even in the Divine Armor Realm, the Black God Armor Stone is very rare, and if you want to snatch the Black God Armor Stone from the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the Divine Armor Realm, you have to kill them.

Therefore, there are too few great ancestors in the Xuanqi Realm who have the Black God Armor Stone.

"This guy, you're in luck!"

The Great Ancestor of the Star Sea was crazy with jealousy.

At this moment, he couldn't help the Blood Ancestor at all, and he couldn't even hurt him.

Of course, the Blood Ancestor couldn't hurt him.

But a piece of Black God Armor Stone directly smoothed out the gap between the Blood Ancestor and him, this is the value of the Black God Armor Stone.

Airplanes!!!

The Blood Ancestor was shrouded in a ray of light, and instantly teleported to the sixth layer of the Ruined Stone Tower.

And after the Raccoon Blood Ancestor created the Superior Immeasurable Body Secret Technique, Ye Tian finally created a superior Immeasurable Body Secret Technique.

This time, he was ahead of the other high-level immeasurable lifeforms.
